page: Microsoft Azure NC12s_v3 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the NCSv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel processor with 12 dedicated vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 224.0 GB of system memory, which translates to a high memory-to-core ratio of 18.67 GB per vCPU.

This instance is equipped with two hardware GPUs to accelerate parallel computing tasks. For local data requirements, the server provides 1509 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disk options. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the combination of dual GPUs, substantial memory capacity, and dedicated Intel vCPUs, the NC12s_v3 is designed for compute-heavy and memory-intensive workloads. The qualitative cost profile reflects a specialized hardware class where the resource density of GPUs and high RAM-per-core ratio is optimized for deep learning, scientific simulations, and GPU-accelerated database queries rather than general-purpose computing.
description: The Microsoft Azure NC12s_v3 is a specialized virtual machine from the NCSv3 family, built on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and powered by an Intel x86_64 processor. It features 12 dedicated vCPUs paired with 224.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high ratio of 18.67 GB of RAM per core. The instance is equipped with two GPUs for hardware acceleration and includes 1509 GB of local storage alongside Premium Storage compatibility. Designed for resource-intensive operations, this server is optimized for workloads requiring parallel GPU processing and significant memory capacity. The qualitative cost efficiency is aligned with its high-density hardware profile, making it suitable for specialized tasks such as machine learning training, CUDA-based simulations, and high-performance data processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NC12s_v3 is an Intel-powered virtual machine featuring 12 dedicated vCPUs, 224 GB of RAM, two GPUs, and 1509 GB of local storage, optimized for GPU-accelerated and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure NC12s_v3 is an Intel-powered VM with 12 vCPUs, 224 GB RAM, two GPUs, and 1509 GB local storage, built for GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel processors, high memory density, and local storage for intensive parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: Twelve dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
Two integrated GPUs for hardware-accelerated parallel processing
224.0 GB of system memory providing 18.67 GB per core
1509 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor
Optimized for machine learning, scientific simulations, and data processing
